videos.headline: Highlight: No. 17 Ole Miss fends off Taylen Green and Arkansas
videos.description: QB Trinidad Chambliss throws for 353 yards and a TD while adding 62 yards and two TDs on the ground as Ole Miss negates Taylen Green's 416 total yards, beating Arkansas 41-35.

videos.headline: Kiffin, Chambliss discuss staying ready after win over Arkansas
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss touches on his journey from Division II to winning SEC games with No. 17 Ole Miss while Kiffin emphasizes how important getting a win in this conference is.
